prompt: A breathtakingly enchanting, hyper-realistic photograph of the same beautiful and radiant spiritual healer — the same sacred shaman queen from the reference images — now bringing all that divine energy she channeled from the cosmos into a sacred Namastê prayer gesture. She is the same exact woman. Reproduce her face with precision in the most flattering, luminous golden light: her skin glowing with inner radiance, warm golden light illuminating her cheeks and forehead, creating an angelic aura around her. Her expression is one of deep spiritual gratitude and sacred reverence — eyes gently closed, a serene transcendent smile of pure peace and divine love, her face radiating enchanting beauty and spiritual completeness. She wears the same exact ceremonial outfit: the flowing white oversized poncho-style tunic with dramatic V-shaped panels of long black fringe cascading from the shoulders down the chest, intricate white-and-blue geometric stitching bordering the fringe, purple and dark fringe flowing along the side edges of the poncho, and the vivid red-orange underlayer visible at the sleeves. Same white wrapped turban. Same cowrie shell bracelet on her wrist. Same rings on her fingers. POSE: Her hands are pressed together in the sacred Namastê prayer position at heart center — palms flat together, fingers pointing upward, held at chest height. Her head is slightly bowed in reverence, honoring the divine energy she has received. ENERGY AND ATMOSPHERE: The scene maintains the same magical golden hour divine energy from the previous frame. Dramatic god rays — thick, visible beams of warm golden sunlight — pierce through the forest canopy and converge around her body, as if the sun itself is blessing her sacred prayer. Tiny golden particles of light, like sacred luminous dust and pollen, float and shimmer in the air all around her, creating a visible field of divine energy surrounding her body. The golden light catches the black fringe of her garment making it shimmer. Her white clothing glows ethereally in the backlight. The cowrie shell bracelet catches golden light beautifully. The forest behind her is the same cathedral of tall trees with smooth trunks, their canopy forming a natural sacred temple. Lens flare from the sun adds to the divine atmosphere. The golden energy that was flowing down from the sky now appears to be concentrated and contained within her prayer hands, as if she has gathered all the cosmic energy into this single sacred gesture. The overall feeling is of witnessing the culmination of a sacred ritual — the moment where all the energy of the universe is sealed in prayer. Shot on professional DSLR, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ISO 160. Slightly low angle looking up at her, the same majestic perspective as the previous frame, maintaining visual continuity. Shallow depth of field with her face and prayer hands razor-sharp, forest melting into dreamy golden bokeh. This is the final, most sacred moment of the Benção Sagrada do Cantuá — the shaman sealing the blessing with Namastê.
negative_prompt: anatomy normalization, body proportion averaging, dataset-average anatomy, plastic skin, airbrushed texture, stylized realism, CGI, 3d render, illustration, painterly, cartoon, anime, beauty filter, overexposed, underexposed, blurry face, extra fingers, deformed hands, missing fingers, fused fingers, different clothing, different outfit, different turban, different person, different face, studio lighting, artificial lighting, flash photography, ring light, indoor, different skin tone, male, child, arms open, arms raised, arms at sides, dark mood, cold lighting, blue tones, harsh shadows on face, unflattering angle, grotesque, horror, scary, ugly lighting, no energy, no light rays, flat lighting, dull atmosphere

settings.lighting: dramatic golden hour god rays through forest canopy, backlit, visible light beams, golden particles in air, divine luminous energy concentrated around prayer hands
settings.camera_angle: slightly low angle looking up, majestic and enchanting perspective, same as previous frame
